description: An asset manager reviews the lab results from an oil sample taken from a large power transformer to assess its internal health.

nodes.task_description: Ingest the lab report data, including dissolved gas analysis (DGA), moisture content, and dielectric strength.

expected_outcome.value: System parses and structures the data from the lab report.

nodes.task_description: Compare the results to industry standards (e.g., IEEE C57.104) and the transformer's own historical trends.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that furan levels are rising, indicating paper insulation degradation.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the remaining useful life of the transformer based on the rate of degradation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an updated end-of-life estimate.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a change in maintenance strategy, such as more frequent oil sampling or planning for replacement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends increasing the sampling frequency to every 6 months.
